research_boundary: Research use only. Not for diagnosis, treatment, cure claims, prescribing, clinical deployment, regulatory compliance, or drug-safety certification.
note: Triggers alphafold_d_leakage: P1.Structure attempted to use AlphaFold DB pre-computed structure (Class D, non-commercial). The raw AF-{UniProt}-F{n} identifier is redacted to sha256 prefix. Production pipeline must use OpenFold3 (Apache 2.0) instead.
